items.summary: Rewrite frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx so that all navigation elements are always rendered and never hidden due to layout or overflow issues. The navbar must use a flex layout with `flex-nowrap` and `overflow-visible` on the desktop nav container so items are never clipped or collapsed. The three nav links must be: 'Home' (always visible, navigates to /), 'Dashboard' (visible only when the user is authenticated, navigates to /dashboard), and 'Admin Panel' (visible only when the user is authenticated AND isAdmin is true, navigates to /admin). The Login/Logout button must always be visible on the right side of the navbar, never wrapped or hidden. On desktop (md and above), all visible links and the Login/Logout button must appear in a single horizontal row without overflow. On mobile, the hamburger menu must include the same conditional link set (Home always, Dashboard if authenticated, Admin Panel if authenticated + isAdmin) plus the Login/Logout action. The mobile menu must open and close reliably with no z-index or overflow conflicts.

In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, ensure the useIsCallerAdmin query: (1) is enabled only when identity is non-null, (2) uses a fresh authenticated actor created directly with the identity (not a cached anonymous actor) to call the backend isCallerAdmin() function, (3) uses ['isCallerAdmin', principalString] as the query key so it re-fetches whenever the logged-in principal changes, and (4) has staleTime: 0 and gcTime: 0 so it never returns a stale cached result. This ensures the Admin Panel link appears reliably after login without a page refresh.

In frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, add or verify a useEffect that watches the identity object and, whenever the identity changes from null/undefined to a non-null value (user has just logged in), calls queryClient.invalidateQueries() to invalidate all queries (including isCallerAdmin) so they immediately re-fetch with the new authenticated identity. This prevents the navbar from showing stale unauthenticated state after login.
